zh.Rawreth, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可洛利斯
zh.Pympes, Court, Nettlestead, Kent, Englan: 英國肯特內特萊斯亞德
zh.Nettlestead, Kent, England: 英國肯特內特萊斯亞德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Philippa Thornbury於大約1430年出生在英國肯特時，她的父親John Thornbury41歲，母親Anne Thorleg36歲。她於1447年與John Pympe在英國肯特內特萊斯亞德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1471年之後在英國肯特內特萊斯亞德，埋葬在英國肯特內特萊斯亞德。

zh-hans.Rawreth, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可洛利斯

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Philippa Thornbury于大约1430年出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲John Thornbury41岁，母亲Anne Thorleg36岁。她于1447年与John Pympe在英国肯特內特萊斯亞德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1471年之后在英国肯特內特萊斯亞德，埋葬在英国肯特內特萊斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Thornbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Throneberry
meanings: Alternatively, perhaps an Americanized form of German   Throneburg  .

variants.name: Thornberry
meanings: English (southwestern): habitational name from any of various places called Thornbury, in particular Thornbury (Gloucestershire), Thornbury (Herefordshire), or perhaps Thornbury (Devon), or Thornbury in Bradford (Yorkshire). These placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn’ + burg ‘fortress’ or ‘manor’.
Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thornburgh
meanings: English (Worcestershire) and Irish: variant of   Thornbury  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Philippa Thornbury was born about 1430, in Kent, England, her father, John Thornbury, was 41 and her mother, Anne Thorleg, was 36. She married John Pympe in 1447, in Nettlestead, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1471, in Nettlestead, Kent, England, and was buried in Nettlestead, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Philippa Thornbury est née environ 1430, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Thornbury, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Anne Thorleg, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé John Pympe en 1447, à Nettlestead, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1471, à Nettlestead, Kent, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Nettlestead, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Philippa Thornbury um 1430 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Thornbury 41 und ihre Mutter Anne Thorleg 36. Sie hat 1447 in Nettlestead, Kent, England John Pympe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1471 in Nettlestead, Kent, England und wurde in Nettlestead, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Philippa Thornbury è nata il circa 1430 nel Kent, England, sua padre, John Thornbury, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Anne Thorleg, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato John Pympe nel 1447, nel Nettlestead, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1471, nel Nettlestead, Kent, England, e fu sepolta a Nettlestead, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Philippa Thornburyが約1430年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父John Thornburyは41歳，母Anne Thorlegは36歳であった。1447年にイギリスケントネットレステアドでJohn Pympeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1471年以後にイギリスケントネットレステアドで死去し，イギリスケントネットレステアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Philippa Thornbury(이)가 대략 1430년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Thornbury(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Thorleg(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1447년 영국 켄트 네틀레스테아드에서 John Pympe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1471년 이후 영국 켄트 네틀레스테아드에서 사망했으며 영국 켄트 네틀레스테아드에 묻혔다.

mn.Rawreth, Essex, England: Rawreth, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Philippa Thornbury nasceu aproximadamente 1430, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Thornbury, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Anne Thorleg, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com John Pympe em 1447, em Nettlestead, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1471, em Nettlestead, Kent, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Nettlestead, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Philippa Thornbury родилась около 1430 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени John Thornbury было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Anne Thorleg, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Pympe в 1447 г. в местности неттлестид, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1471 г. в местности неттлестид, кэнт, Англия и была похоронена в местности неттлестид, кэнт, Англия.

sm.about 1430–after 1471: e tusa o le 1430–ina ua ma'ea le 1471

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Philippa Thornbury nació aproximadamente 1430, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John Thornbury, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Anne Thorleg, tenía 36 años. Se casó con John Pympe en 1447, en Nettlestead, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1471, en Nettlestead, Kent, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Nettlestead, Kent, Inglaterra.
